sales.title:

Marcus Aurelius, as Augustus (AD 161-180). AV aureus (19mm, 7.31 gm, 1h). NGC Choice XF 5/5 - 4/5. Rome, AD 165-166. M ANTONINVS AVG-ARMENIACVS, laureate head of Marcus Aurelius right / P M T
sales.description:
Ancients
Marcus Aurelius, as Augustus (AD 161-180). AV aureus (19mm, 7.31 gm, 1h). NGC Choice XF 5/5 - 4/5. Rome, AD 165-166. M ANTONINVS AVG-ARMENIACVS, laureate head of Marcus Aurelius right / P M TR P XX-IMP III COS III, Felicitas standing facing, head left, right foot set on globe, caduceus in outstretched right hand, cornucopia cradled in left arm. Calicó 1899. RIC III 153. Reflective, honeyed flan. 

Marcus Aurelius was born in AD 131 into a patrician family of Spanish origin. At an earl...
